messageId.description: The unique identifier (e.g. UUID) of the message, created by the message creator.

contextId.description: The context id of the message.

taskId.description: The task id of the message.

role.description: Identifies the sender of the message.

parts.description: Parts is the container of the message content.

metadata.description: Any metadata to provide along with the message.

extensions.description: The URIs of extensions that are present or contributed to this Message.

referenceTaskIds.description: A list of task IDs that this message references for additional context.

Part.description: A container for a section of communication content. Exactly one content field is set.

text.description: The string content of the text part.

raw.description: The raw byte content of a file, base64-encoded.

url.description: A URL pointing to the file's content.

data.description: Arbitrary structured data as a JSON value.

metadata.description: Optional metadata associated with this part.

filename.description: An optional filename for the file.

mediaType.description: The MIME type of the part content.
